══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Eladrin — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Eladrin — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 14 damage. Eladrin — Unarmored Caster HP: 53/67
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 15] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 15] MISS.
--- Eladrin — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 53/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Eladrin — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Eladrin — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 11 damage. Eladrin — Unarmored Caster HP: 42/67
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Eladrin — Unarmored Caster HP: 25/67
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 15] MISS.
--- Eladrin — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 25/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
--- Eladrin — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 25/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person

ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
